title: clintonia uniflora
intro: Clintonia uniflora, also known as single-flowered Clintonia, is a perennial plant species in the lily-of-the-valley family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation. The plant's extracts have been found to possess antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including soothing sore throats and relieving congestion. Herbal preparations of Clintonia uniflora include infusions and decoctions, often used as teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
